questions.question: What is a DAO and how does it work?
keyPoints: Definition of a DAO
Explanation of how a DAO works
Example of a DAO in action

questions.question: What was the DAO hack and what were its consequences?
keyPoints: Explanation of the DAO hack
Description of the consequences of the DAO hack
Discussion of the impact of the DAO hack on the blockchain community

questions.question: Compare and contrast Ethereum and Ethereum Classic.
keyPoints: Explanation of the differences between Ethereum and Ethereum Classic
Discussion of the similarities between Ethereum and Ethereum Classic
Analysis of the advantages and disadvantages of each platform

questions.question: What is the importance of secure smart contract development?
keyPoints: Explanation of the risks associated with insecure smart contracts
Discussion of the benefits of secure smart contract development
Example of a secure smart contract in action

questions.question: Discuss the role of governance in a DAO.
keyPoints: Explanation of the concept of governance in a DAO
Discussion of the importance of governance in a DAO
Analysis of the different approaches to governance in a DAO

questions.question: What is Solidity and how is it used in smart contract development?
keyPoints: Definition of Solidity
Explanation of how Solidity is used in smart contract development
Example of a smart contract written in Solidity

questions.question: Explain the concept of a hard fork and how it relates to the DAO hack.
keyPoints: Explanation of the concept of a hard fork
Discussion of how the DAO hack led to a hard fork of the Ethereum blockchain
Analysis of the implications of a hard fork on the blockchain community
